Order Date : XX/XX/year> Order Details : XXXX pairs of custom blinds Total Amount : {$1600.00} Initial Delivery Date : XX/XX/year> Actual Delivery Date : XX/XX/year> Issue Description The delivery was late, arriving on XX/XX/XXXX instead of XX/XX/XXXX. 
The blinds received were incorrect : o The control arm was supposed to be on the left, but the blinds had the control arm in the center.

o Two blades were missing.

o Hardware was missing.

o One head rail was damaged. 
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX to report the incorrect delivery. 
XXXX stated she would call back but did not. 
Follow-up calls were made on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX with no resolution. 
________________________________________ This report summarizes the order, delivery issues, and communication attempts regarding the incorrect blinds received.
